function:
def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """ 
    Thought 1: The ratio of recency to total donation history may reveal consistency in donation behavior.
    New Feature 1: Donation_Recency_Ratio | Donation_Recency_Ratio = Recency / Time
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    This function generates new features and modifies the existing ones to enhance the model performance for the blood donation prediction task.
    It calculates the ratio of recency to total donation history, frequency logarithm, monetary residual, time minimum, frequency logarithm, 
    monetary square, time maximum, donation frequency minimum, donation frequency maximum, donation time residual, 
    donation time logarithm, donation frequency rank, donation time rank, monetary logarithm, and monetary square root.
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate recency of donations
    df_output['Donation_Recency_Ratio'] = df_output['Recency'] / df_output['Time']
    
    # Calculate frequency logarithm
    df_output['Frequency_Logarithm'] = np.log(df_output['Frequency'])
    
    # Calculate monetary residual
    df_output['Monetary_Residual'] = df_output['Monetary'] - df_output['Monetary'].mean()
    
    # Calculate time minimum
    df_output['Time_Minimum'] = df_output['Time'].apply(lambda x: x - np.abs(x - df_output['Time'].min()))
    
    # Calculate frequency logarithm with a check for zero
    df_output['Frequency_Logarithm_Check'] = np.log(df_output['Frequency'] + 1)
    
    # Calculate monetary square
    df_output['Monetary_Square'] = df_output['Monetary'] ** 2
    
    # Calculate time maximum
    df_output['Time_Maximum'] = df_output['Time'].apply(lambda x: x + np.abs(x - df_output['Time'].max()))
    
    # Calculate donation frequency minimum
    df_output['Donation_Frequency_Minimum'] = df_output['Frequency'].apply(lambda x: x - np.abs(x - df_output['Frequency'].min()))
    
    # Calculate donation frequency maximum
    df_output['Donation_Frequency_Maximum'] = df_output['Frequency'].apply(lambda x: x + np.abs(x - df_output['Frequency'].max()))
    
    # Calculate donation time residual
    df_output['Donation_Time_Residual'] = df_output['Time'] - df_output['Time'].mean()
    
    # Calculate donation time logarithm
    df_output['Donation_Time_Logarithm'] = np.log(df_output['Time'])
